hard_stops.logic: association information is required before HOA management can proceed
reserve fund is critically underfunded below 30% — special assessment or emergency funding required
association has missed more than 2 required filings — dissolution risk is imminent

soft_flags.logic: reserve funding is below the association's target threshold — plan contribution increases
assessment delinquency rate exceeds 10% — collection enforcement may be needed
developer-to-owner transition deadline is within 90 days — ensure turnover preparation
more than 90 days since last board meeting — governance compliance risk
